chunks.text: Claudius Ptolemaeus Claudius Ptolemaeus Ptolemy was an astronomer , mathemetician and geographer in the second century A.D. He codified the Greek geocentric view of the universe, and rationalized the apparent retrograde motion of the planets using e

apparent retrograde motion of the planets using epicycles . The Ptolemaic system remained the accepted wisdom until the Polish scholar Copernicus proposed a heliocentric view in 1543. Encyclopedia Britannica entry for Ptolemy Merriam Webster Dictio

ritannica entry for Ptolemy Merriam Webster Dictionary Entry - Includes pronounciation. Basically, the P in Ptolemy is silent: 'tol-em-ee' Last updated 01/12/99. Send comments to www@ptolemy.eecs.berkeley.edu .
